title: citropsis schweinfurthii
intro: Citropsis schweinfurthii, also known as the Ethiopian bitter orange, is a species of citrus plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. Its health benefits include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Citropsis schweinfurthii include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
